zh.lifeSummary: 當Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud於大約1170年出生在威爾士拉德諾斯爾阿貝雷德福時，她的父親Einion Clud ap Madog72歲，母親Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog52歲。她於1215年與Gronwy ap Einion在威爾士卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud于大约1170年出生在威尔士拉德諾斯爾阿貝雷德福时，她的父亲Einion Clud ap Madog72岁，母亲Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog52岁。她于1215年与Gronwy ap Einion在威尔士卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Einion, ap Eynon ‘son of Einion’. See Eynon and compare Bennion . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Eynon
meanings: Welsh: from Enniaun, an old Welsh personal name ultimately derived from Late Latin Annianus, but also associated with Welsh einion ‘anvil’, taken as implying stability and fortitude. See also Beynon and compare Onion .

nameMeanings.name: Clud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from an old vernacular form of the personal name   Claude  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Claude in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Klouda
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Georg, Viktor.
Czech: from Kloud, a vernacular short form of the Latin personal name Claudius (see Claud ).

variants.name: Cloud
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near an outcrop or hill, from Old English clūd ‘rock’ (only later used to denote vapor formations in the sky), or a habitational name from any of numerous places so named, such as Temple Cloud (Somerset), Cloud Bridge (Warwickshire), and Clouds Wood (Hertfordshire).

Native American: translation into English (and shortening) of a personal name based on a word, such as Lakota and Dakota Sioux mahpiya, meaning ‘cloud’. Among the Sioux, several of their traditional personal names with this element were adopted as surnames (translated into English), e.g. Iron Cloud (see Ironcloud ) and Red Cloud (see Redcloud ).
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hlodald, composed of the elements hlōd ‘famous, clear’ + wald ‘rule’, which was borne by a Christian saint and bishop of the 6th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud was born about 1170, in Aberedw, Radnorshire, Wales, her father, Einion Clud ap Madog, was 72 and her mother, Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog, was 52. She married Gronwy ap Einion in 1215, in Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud est née environ 1170, à Aberedw, Radnorshire, Galles, son père, Einion Clud ap Madog, avait 72 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Gronwy ap Einion en 1215, à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles.

ja.lifeSummary: Lliwelydd verch Einion Cludが約1170年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアアバーエドウで生まれた時，父Einion Clud ap Madogは72歳，母Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madogは52歳であった。1215年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでGronwy ap Einionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud(이)가 대략 1170년 웨일스 라드노르실르 압레드w에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Einion Clud ap Madog(은)는 72세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 1215년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Gronwy ap Einion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud родилась около 1170 г. в местности абиредв, радноршир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Einion Clud ap Madog было 72 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gronwy ap Einion в 1215 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей.
